sqlCommands.descr: Update TransX set Flex5 = Flex9 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 like '%LIC' and coalesce(Flex9,'') <> '' and coalesce(Flex5,'') = ''
Update TransX set Amt1=-Amt1, Amt2=-Amt2, Amt3=-Amt3 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 in ('BROK','BROKx','COMM','COMMx','WP','WPx')
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'E' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 like '%x' and Flex7 = 'I'
[ReplaceConnString][LockDownConnString]

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Co,Flex3,Crcy,Flex2,PC,PCdesc,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,UWYR,TP,Flex7,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]','IR17_LIC',Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,PC_Desc,Portfolio_PC,Program,ACD,UWYR,TP,Incl_Excl,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_LIC where  YearPeriod >= '[Yr]01' and YearPeriod <= '[Yr][Mo]' GROUP BY Co,GL_Grp,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,PC_Desc,Portfolio_PC,Program,ACD,UWYR,TP,Incl_Excl)
[ReplaceConnString][OriginalConnString]
insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Flex1) (select '[batchID]-data2',Field1,Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Review Notes' and ID = 'M10')
Update x set Crcy = y.Field1 From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Swap' and y.Descr = x.Crcy where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex3 = Flex3 + 'x' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%999%' and Flex1 = 'SAP LIC'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('5489900','5489901') and Ledger = 'US'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone = '2' and not TP like 'F%' and not (TP = '' and contract in ('','RRP RECLASS'))
Update TransX set Flex6 = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '14%' or GL like '15%' or GL like '23%' or GL like '287%') and Flex6 is null
Update TransX set Flex6 = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('18','20','21') and Flex6 is null
Update TransX set Flex6 = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 is null
Update TransX set Flex1 = 'SAP late', Amt1 = -Amt1, Amt2 = -Amt2, Amt3 = -Amt3, PK = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('S','H')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'SAP late' and not Ledger in (select LedgerGroup from LedgerGroups where Ledger = 'IF') and not Ledger = ''
Update TransX set Flex6 = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
Update TransX set Flex6 = 'D' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'
Update TransX set Flex6 = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '2%'
Update TransX set BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'

Update x set Flex3 = y.Field1, Flex1 = Flex1 + ' LIC' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on substring(GL,1,4) = y.Descr and y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'LIC' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 is NULL

Update x set Flex3 = y.Field1, Flex1 = Flex1 + ' LIC' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on substring(GL,1,3) = y.Descr and y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'LIC' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 is NULL
update TransX set Amt2 = -Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,1) = '2' and not (Flex1 = 'Ceded' and substring(GL,1,2) = '28')
Update x set x.PCdesc = y.Descr, x.Flex5 = y.Program, x.Flex8 = y.Product from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.Flex2 = y.Crcy from TransX x inner join Companies y on x.Co = y.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex7 = (case when Flex2 like '%x' then 'E' else 'I' end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'X' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and len(TP) = 4
Update TransX set Flex7 = 'X' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2999','3999')
Update TransX set Flex3 = 'RCR IF' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 = 'RCR' and Co = '2999' and (TP like 'F%' or TP = '')
Update TransX set Flex7 = (case when PC like '6%' then 'E' else 'I' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 = 'RCR IF'
Update x set Rate1 = c.Rate From TransX x inner join CrcyRates c on c.Crcy = x.Flex1 and c.Typ = 'S' and c.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Amt1 = Amt3, Amt2 = round(Amt3/Rate1,2), Flex9 = x.Crcy, Crcy = 'USD' From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Exp' and y.Descr = x.Crcy where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex3 = 'RCR IF' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 = 'RCR' and Zone = '2'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1,Co,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,UWYR,Crcy,Flex3,Flex6,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID,Flex1, Co,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,UWYR,Crcy,'RCR' as Flex3,Flex6,-Amt1,-Amt2,-Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Flex3 = 'RCR IF')
Update TransX set Flex1 = 'SAP CF' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'SAP'
Update TransX set UWYR = '2010' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and UWYR <> '' and UWYR < '2010' and Flex1 in ('SAP CF','SAP late')
Update TransX set UWYR = '1959' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and UWYR = ''
Update TransX set UWYR = '1958' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and UWYR = '9999'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1,Co,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,UWYR,Crcy,Flex3,Flex6,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,PK) (select KeyID,Flex1, Co,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,UWYR,Crcy,Flex3,Flex6,round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2),round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2),round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2), '1' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID,Flex1, Co,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,UWYR,Crcy,Flex3,Flex6)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

update TransX set TPname = m.Name, Flex6 = m.SchedFname, Division = coalesce(m.NAIC,Division,''), Location = coalesce(m.FedID,Location,'') from TransX t inner join TPs m on t.TP = m.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Flex4 = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + x.Flex6 + 'N' + (case when x.TP like 'F%' then 'A' else 'T' end) + 'P0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.Flex8 and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Co,GL,Crcy,Flex2,PC,PCdesc,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,UWYR,TP,Flex7,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]','IR17_CF',Co,GL,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,PC_Desc,Portfolio_PC,Program,ACD,UWYR,TP,Incl_Excl,round(-sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(-sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt,round(-sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt from IR17_CF where  YearPeriod >= '[Yr]01' and YearPeriod <= '[Yr][Mo]' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,PC_Desc,Portfolio_PC,Program,ACD,UWYR,TP,Incl_Excl)

insert into [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Co,GL,Crcy,Flex2,PC,PCdesc,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,UWYR,TP,Flex7,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Flex3) (select '[batchID]','IR17_RIP',Co,GL,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,PC_Desc,Portfolio_PC,Program,ACD,UWYR,TP,Incl_Excl,round(sum(Doc_Amt),2) as Doc_Amt,round(sum(LC_Amt),2) as LC_Amt,round(sum(LC2_Amt),2) as LC2_Amt, 'RIP' as Flex3 from IR17_CF where  YearPeriod >= '[Yr]01' and YearPeriod <= '[Yr][Mo]' and GL = '1310001' and Group2_Desc = 'Claims' and Source = 'R65' GROUP BY Co,GL,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,PC_Desc,Portfolio_PC,Program,ACD,UWYR,TP,Incl_Excl)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Contract,Flex1,Flex2,Yr,Txt,RefKey2,RefKey3,Flex3,Flex4) (Select '[batchID]',CatCode, Descr, DescrSAP, CatYear, OrigID, InSAP, Sys, CreatedBy, convert(varchar,CreatedOn,101) as CreatedOn from CatCodes)
update TransX set Flex3 = substring(Flex3,11,99) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(Flex3,1,10) = 'ODYSSEYRE\'
update TransX set Txt = '''' + Txt from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(Txt,1,1) = '0'
update TransX set Contract = '''' + Contract from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(Contract,1,1) = '0'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('2855000','5489900','5489901') and Ledger = 'US'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '232%' or GL like '2822%' or GL like '222%')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Ceded', Flex2 = 'no', Flex5 = 'non-affiliate', Amt2 = Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Assumed' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat >= '20' and BusCat <= '29'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Assumed' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '13%'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Direct' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'yes' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '%96' or GL like '%98')
update TransX set Flex3 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.ID and t.Flex1 = m.Field1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'GL Sched F'
update TransX set Amt2 = -Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((substring(GL,1,1) = '4' and Flex1 <> 'Ceded') or (substring(GL,1,1) = '5' and Flex1 = 'Ceded'))
update TransX set Flex5 = 'affiliate' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP <> ''
update TransX set Flex4 = m.Name, Flex6 = m.SchedFname, Division = m.NAIC, Location = m.FedID from TransX t inner join Brokers m on t.ReinName = m.Broker where KeyID = '[batchID]'
